prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次约3766→4109→3609→3419→2079，整体呈波动中前移趋势；2025年位次大幅跃升至约2079名，较2024年前移约1340名，主要受考试模式 从「理科」调整为「物理类」及选科要求变化影响，2025年基准位次约2079名；该校在内蒙古理科组招生计划：2021–2024年均为33人，2025年增至36人；2026 年计划40人，较2025年扩招约11.1%，扩招对竞争有缓解作用，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第32 名，近年排名略有后移（2021年第27→2026年第32），整体稳居国内工科强校前列；2026年高考周期声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要因校内偷拍事件引发舆论关 注，处理结果引发社会讨论，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第87（一般），短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平；近五年未见明显投档断档记录；轻工技术与工程A+、化学工程与技术A、材料科学与工程A、环境科学与工程A、食品科学与工程A、建筑学A-、控制科学与工程A-、机械工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共 9个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出；招生专业中计算机类、电气类、自动化类等对应学科评估较高，对考生有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域:
计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工 程等专业社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐；土木建筑、生化环材类呈分化观望或明显劝退；该校化工、材料、食品等优势学科部分属于「生化环材」范畴，可能对报考热度产生一定 下拉作用；内蒙古2026年物理类考生约11.1万人（按历史比例估算），较2025年8.4万人增长约32%，考生规模大幅增加将加剧竞争；华南理工大学位于广东省广州市，非内蒙古本省高校，跨省招生占比极小（2025年该校全国总招生中内蒙古占比约1.3%），地域偏好对内蒙古考生报考影响中性。
8. 【预测结论】综合2025年位次大幅前移后的回调压力、2026年扩招约11.1%的缓解效应、内蒙古物理类考生规模增长约32%带来的竞争加剧、以及学校声誉负面信号的轻微抑制，预 计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约2268名，区间1928–2608名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约2268名，区间1928–2608名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<1928名）可重点冲刺一档的AI拔尖 班、计算机类等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>2608名）建议以三档专业为主，争取进入该校。注意该校多数专业要求首选物理、再选化学，报考时需确认选科匹配。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 3766 → 4109 → 3609 → 3419 → 2079, showing a fluctuating but generally advancing trend; in 2025, the ranking jumped significantly to about 2079, moving forward by about 1340 places compared to 2024, mainly due to the adjustment of the exam mode from 'Science' to 'Physics Category' and changes in subject selection requirements, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being about 2079; the university's enrollment plan for the science group in Inner Mongolia: 33 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 36 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 40 students, an expansion of about 11.1% compared to 2025, which alleviates competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 32nd in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with a slight decline in recent years (27th in 2021 → 32nd in 2026), but overall remains among the top engineering universities in China; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative', mainly due to a campus peeping incident that sparked public attention and the handling results triggered social discussion, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 87th (average), with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level; no obvious enrollment gaps in the past five years; Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Food Science and Engineering A, Architecture A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 9 A- and above disciplines, highlighting strong engineering capabilities; among the enrollment majors, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Automation, etc., have high corresponding discipline evaluations, attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be hot/highly recommended; Civil Engineering and Architecture, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials show differentiation and are noticeably discouraged; the university's advantageous disciplines like Chemical Engineering, Materials, and Food Science partly fall into the 'Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials' category, which may have a downward effect on application enthusiasm; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Inner Mongolia is about 111,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), an increase of about 32% compared to 85,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, not a local university in Inner Mongolia, with a very small cross-provincial enrollment proportion (in 2025, Inner Mongolia accounted for about 1.3% of the university's total national enrollment), and regional preference has a neutral impact on Inner Mongolia candidates' applications.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering the downward pressure after the significant ranking advance in 2025, the alleviating effect of an 11.1% expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 32% increase in Inner Mongolia Physics Category candidates, and the slight suppression from negative reputation signals, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2268, with a range of 1928–2608.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 2268, with a range of 1928–2608. If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<1928), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as the AI Top Class and Computer Science; if your ranking is near the upper limit (>2608), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to secure admission to the university. Note that most majors at this university require Physics as the first choice and Chemistry as the second choice, so confirm subject selection when applying.
